notes: Use one row per player per game.
Only include information known before tip-off in current-row context columns.
Same-game box score stats should only appear in historical rows; upcoming rows should leave them blank or omit them.
Fantasy projections require historical steals, blocks, turnovers, and three_points_made for component-based scoring.
Live auto-generation of upcoming slates works best when historical rows include a team column.
Use context_updates.csv for continuously refreshed availability, suspension, odds, and minutes context.
The live engine also writes provider_context_updates.csv for automated odds and injury-source updates.
Teammate-composition and hourly news context are optional live features and should only use pre-tipoff information.
Optional player market-line context (line_points, line_rebounds, line_assists, line_pra, line_three_points_made) can improve projection calibration.
Text-heavy columns such as family context work better when encoded into short structured categories instead of free-form notes.
Season priors from aggregate player-season tables belong in season_priors.csv, not training_data.csv.

state.cloud_archive_note: Archived 10 dataset updates to cloud storage.

live_ingest.name: Live Ingest
live_ingest.description: Continuously ingests schedule, scoreboard, boxscore, and provider context feeds.

notes_engine.name: Notes Engine
notes_engine.description: Builds live action notes, postgame notes, and compiled daily notes context.

model_trainer.name: Model Trainer
model_trainer.description: Retrains bundles and refreshes projections from synced data.

backtester.name: Backtester
backtester.description: Runs benchmark snapshots and formal benchmark evaluations.

alerts.name: Alerts
alerts.description: Produces runtime diagnostics and actionable reliability warnings.

training_data.granularity: one row per player per completed game

upcoming_slate.granularity: one row per player per upcoming game

season_priors.granularity: one row per player-team aggregate season prior

prizepicks_lines.granularity: one row per player-market line capture

context_updates.granularity: one row per player-game context override

provider_context_updates.granularity: one row per player-game provider context

prizepicks_edges.granularity: one row per player-market edge computation

playstyle_sources.name: NBA Live Scoreboard Feed
playstyle_sources.purpose: live game state and in-game stat updates

playstyle_sources.name: NBA Schedule Feed
playstyle_sources.purpose: future slate generation and game keying

recommendations.action: Capture open-to-close movement per market and increase multi-book coverage.
Expand row coverage for deep-rotation players and keep season priors synchronized.
data_needed: upcoming_slate rows for all active roster players

recommendations.action: Stabilize the live loop: clear recurring job failures, keep live sync running, and keep sync age within freshness target.

additional_data_targets.why: Tightens starter probability and minutes certainty before tip.

additional_data_targets.data: expected minutes with confidence and cap reason
additional_data_targets.why: Prevents under/over projection drift for rotation-volatile players.
Improves per-market calibration and uncertainty estimation.
Improves usage redistribution and teammate dynamics.
Improves shot-style matchup adjustments by market.
Stabilizes home-court and away-game boost/downgrade logic.

prediction_algorithm.name: contextual_blend_v05
prediction_algorithm.objective: Keep model projections aligned while tightening pregame context reliability.
prediction_algorithm.runtime_target: continuous live sync with low stale-state risk

v2_execution_plan.name: Lock-window certainty refresh
v2_execution_plan.goal: Tighten starter probability and expected minutes at T-90, T-30, T-5 windows.

v2_execution_plan.name: Market calibration tightening
v2_execution_plan.goal: Blend model and market anchors with stronger open-to-close weighting.

v2_execution_plan.name: Coverage depth hardening
v2_execution_plan.goal: Ensure deep rotation rows are present in upcoming slate + season priors.

v2_execution_plan.name: Shot/playstyle and teammate dynamics update
v2_execution_plan.goal: Refresh shot-style, playstyle, and teammate context before projection pass.

v2_execution_plan.name: Runtime reliability audit
v2_execution_plan.goal: Verify live loop freshness, error-free state, and background job health.

v2_execution_plan.name: Final debug + diagnostics
v2_execution_plan.goal: Run pipeline/status checks and confirm tightened accuracy + coverage gates.

manual_data_intake_when_blocked.how_to_submit: Paste CSV rows into PrizePicks Lines import (player_name, team, game_date, market, line).

manual_data_intake_when_blocked.when_needed: BETR or other app-only line snapshots are inaccessible automatically
manual_data_intake_when_blocked.how_to_submit: Attach/export CSV or paste tabular lines using the same schema as above.

manual_data_intake_when_blocked.when_needed: Breaking lineup/news context not captured by automated feeds
manual_data_intake_when_blocked.how_to_submit: Paste player-level updates into context feed with lineup/minutes/injury fields.

manual_chatbox_steps.what_to_send: PrizePicks/BETR prop lines as CSV text or file attachment.
Any last-minute lineup/injury/news overrides not yet captured by feeds.
Ask: 'import this into lines/context and rerun sync + predict + edges'.
